records.title: HMRC showed no listed CDS downtime or service issues at 18:08 UTC on 17 July
records.summary: At 18:08 UTC on 17 July 2026, HMRC's CDS availability page showed no planned downtime and no service issues. The page's latest recorded update was 9 July 2026.
records.why_it_matters: This is a useful point-in-time operating signal, not an uptime promise. A later HMRC update can change the position quickly.
records.operator_action: Check HMRC's live status page before time-critical submissions and keep normal queue, response, and retry monitoring in place.

workflow_impacts.impact: HMRC listed no active access issue at the observation time.
workflow_impacts.action: Continue normal access monitoring and recheck the live source if access fails.

workflow_impacts.impact: HMRC listed no planned CDS submission downtime at the observation time.
workflow_impacts.action: Use normal submission controls and confirm the live status before a time-critical run.

provenance.locator: Service availability; Planned downtime; Service issues

records.title: HMRC published CDS consolidated workarounds release 5.2.0
records.summary: HMRC's 4 July update identifies consolidated workaround document 5.2.0 and says its Known Error Log changes cover additions, amendments, and resolutions through 25 June 2026.
records.why_it_matters: Teams troubleshooting a rejected declaration may otherwise rely on an older workaround, a resolved item, or an incomplete change list.
records.operator_action: Use the current 5.2.0 artifact and its individual change-log tabs to verify the specific error or difference before changing a declaration workflow.

workflow_impacts.impact: The consolidated release may change which HMRC workaround applies to a known rejection or completion mismatch.
workflow_impacts.action: Match the exact error or known-difference entry and read its current status and change log.

workflow_impacts.impact: Resolved or amended workaround entries can change the correct resubmission path.
workflow_impacts.action: Confirm the entry remains current before resubmitting or changing mapped data.

provenance.locator: Updates to this page: 4 July 2026; consolidated document 5.2.0

records.title: HMRC linked a CDS technical documentation package dated 9 July 2026
records.summary: HMRC's developer guide linked a 54.4 MB CDS technical documentation package dated 9 July 2026 for Community System Providers and third-party software developers.
records.why_it_matters: A new package can change specifications or test expectations across the CDS declaration lifecycle even when a user-facing status page is green.
records.operator_action: Diff the package against the previously approved version and route material specification changes through integration tests before release.

workflow_impacts.impact: Package changes may affect notification or status-query implementation details.
workflow_impacts.action: Include notification and query journeys in the package-diff review and regression suite.

workflow_impacts.impact: The dated package is the latest technical-documentation bundle linked by HMRC at capture time.
workflow_impacts.action: Record the artifact version and compare technical files before changing an integration.

provenance.locator: Technical Documentation; CDS Technical Documentation package metadata

records.title: CDS document code 9001 updated for UK-India FTA use from 15 July
records.summary: HMRC updated national document code 9001 on 13 July to reflect use under the UK-India Free Trade Agreement from 15 July 2026.
records.why_it_matters: Document-code mappings and declaration templates using the new agreement may need a dated update before the code is selected.
records.operator_action: Review HMRC's current code instruction and the relevant tariff measure before updating templates or selecting code 9001 for a consignment.

workflow_impacts.impact: The stated use of national document code 9001 changed for declarations from 15 July 2026.
workflow_impacts.action: Update dated code reference data only after reviewing the current HMRC instruction.

workflow_impacts.impact: Internal code lists or CMS mappings may not yet reflect the 13 July source update.
workflow_impacts.action: Compare the maintained mapping with the official source and test the affected path.

provenance.locator: Updates to this page: 13 July 2026; document code 9001

records.title: HMRC updated CDS aggregation guidance for EU EORIs in specified data elements
records.summary: HMRC's 1 July update says Data Element 2/1 was changed to reflect that EU EORIs can be declared in certain data elements from 4 July 2026.
records.why_it_matters: Supplementary-declaration mappings that previously assumed only GB or XI identifiers may reject or mishandle an eligible EU EORI path.
records.operator_action: Review the current Data Element 2/1 aggregation instruction and test the affected party-identifier mapping before changing production behaviour.

workflow_impacts.impact: Specified aggregated-declaration references can now include an EU EORI from the stated effective date.
workflow_impacts.action: Verify the exact eligible data element and identifier format in the current HMRC instruction.

workflow_impacts.impact: Aggregation templates and validation paths may need a dated EU-EORI case.
workflow_impacts.action: Add a source-backed EU-EORI test case without broadening unrelated EORI acceptance.

provenance.locator: Updates to this page: 1 July 2026; Data Element 2/1
